description: Generate end-to-end tests for Aztec contracts with real network interaction

test_cases.prompt: Write an E2E test for a two-player game on Aztec
Set up Jest for Aztec integration testing
test_cases.rationale: Test runner setup — covered by jest-setup.md

test_cases.prompt: How do I test contract deployment against a live network?
test_cases.rationale: Live network testing — core E2E skill

test_cases.prompt: Write a test with multiple Aztec accounts interacting
How do I test sponsored fee payment in my tests?
test_cases.rationale: Fee payment in tests — covered by sponsored-testing.md

test_cases.prompt: Set up cross-wallet testing with two separate PXE instances
How do I test transaction failure in Aztec E2E?
test_cases.rationale: Error testing patterns — covered by test-patterns.md

test_cases.prompt: What timeout values should I use for Aztec E2E tests?
Write a TXE unit test for my contract
test_cases.rationale: TXE testing — should trigger aztec-developer (not E2E)

test_cases.prompt: Write a pytest for my Flask app
How do notes work in Aztec?
Create a TypeScript client for my contract
Set up Cypress for my React app
How do I compile my Aztec contract?

conflict_prompts.prompt: Write a test for my contract that runs on the local network
conflict_prompts.rationale: 'local network' signals E2E, not TXE. But 'test' alone is ambiguous.

conflict_prompts.prompt: How do I test private state?
conflict_prompts.rationale: Could be TXE or E2E. Without 'network' qualifier, should default to aztec-developer/txe/.
